imageComparison.summary: Replace this with a concise comparison summary.

majorDiffAreas.title: Replace with the highest-impact observed mismatch
majorDiffAreas.expected: Describe the expected visual or structural state.
majorDiffAreas.actual: Describe the actual visual or structural state.
majorDiffAreas.impact: Explain why this matters for fidelity or UX.
majorDiffAreas.recommendedChange: Describe one scoped change for the next iteration.

recommendation.topFix: Verify the highest-impact visible mismatch, then make one scoped polish change.
recommendation.why: This minimal template is valid but should be replaced with concrete comparison evidence.
